title: Fairy dots
description: Shows a typing indicator above players’ heads while they are writing in chat. A simple multiplayer communication mod for Fabric servers and clients
body:
Fairy Dots adds a visible typing indicator above a player’s head whenever they are writing a chat message.

This makes Minecraft multiplayer feel more alive: other players can instantly see that someone is typing, waiting to reply, or about to say something. It is especially useful for roleplay servers, social servers, SMPs, and any community where smooth communication matters.

Features:
* Typing dots above players while they type in chat
* Simple and lightweight
* Improves multiplayer communication
* Great for roleplay and social interaction
* Works on Fabric for client and server

For now only support fabric
